description: Fix dark mode theme across the entire app for consistency and polish. The app uses next-themes with class strategy. Many components have hardcoded light colors (bg-white, text-slate-900, bg-[#F7F7FA]) without dark mode equivalents. Fix these globally so the dark theme looks premium and cohesive.
steps: Fix app/dashboard/page.tsx: Change bg-[#F7F7FA] to bg-background (uses CSS variable). Fix the black hero section to work in dark mode (it already looks fine in dark). Fix the customer-orders-client.tsx status bar that has hardcoded bg-white - add dark:bg-slate-900.

Fix components/dashboard/customer-orders-client.tsx dark mode: (1) Status bar div has bg-white - add dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:shadow-none. (2) Order article cards have bg-white - add dark:bg-slate-900. (3) Items section has bg-slate-50 - add dark:bg-slate-800. (4) Text colors: text-slate-900 needs dark:text-white, text-slate-700 needs dark:text-slate-300, text-slate-400/500 needs dark:text-slate-500. (5) Borders: border-slate-100 needs dark:border-slate-800. (6) Approval card bg-amber-50 needs dark:bg-amber-950/30.

Fix components/home/recent-orders-section.tsx dark mode: Section header text-slate-900 needs dark:text-white. Order cards have bg-white and border-slate-100 already handled by global CSS overrides but verify the text colors are correct.

Fix components/mobile-bottom-nav.tsx dark mode: The active tab has bg-black text-white which works in both modes. The inactive tabs use text-slate-500 and hover:bg-white/65 - change hover to hover:bg-slate-800/65 for dark. The ios-glass class already has dark mode support.

Fix components/header.tsx dark mode: Mobile header uses ios-glass (has dark support). Desktop header bg-white needs explicit dark:bg-slate-950 (already has it - verify). Navigation link colors in dark mode.
Fix app/account/page.tsx dark mode: bg-[#F7F7FA] should become bg-background. Cards with bg-white should get dark:bg-slate-900. Text colors need dark variants.

Add a global rule in globals.css: .dark body background should use the dark CSS variable gradient (update the body radial gradient for dark mode to use a subtle dark green tint instead of the light one).
Fix the floating-cart-bar dark mode style (already has dark variant in globals.css - verify it works). Fix any remaining components that use bg-slate-50 without dark:bg-slate-800 equivalent.
acceptance_criteria: Toggling to dark mode shows consistent dark backgrounds across all customer-facing pages
No white flashes or unstyled sections in dark mode
Text remains readable with proper contrast in dark mode
Cards, buttons, and interactive elements all have dark mode variants
The body background in dark mode uses a subtle dark gradient instead of the light green tint
verification: Run npx next build to verify no TypeScript or build errors
Grep for bg-[#F7F7FA] to confirm it has been replaced with bg-background or has dark: variant
findings: All bg-[#F7F7FA] instances replaced with bg-background across 7 files. Dark mode global CSS overrides in globals.css were already handling .dark .bg-white and .dark .text-slate-900 etc. but explicit dark: classes were added on components for reliability. Body dark gradient uses reduced opacity green tint (0.04 vs 0.08). ios-squircle-card and ios-map-placeholder got dark variants. The bg-background/90 opacity pattern works correctly with the CSS variable system in this project.
